text:
User: What types of biases are most commonly found in LLM outputs?
AI: Common biases include gender bias, racial bias, and geopolitical bias.

User: Can LLMs reflect societal stereotypes even without intent?
AI: Yes, they often inherit biases from their training data.

User: Is fine-tuning enough to reduce these biases?
AI: Fine-tuning helps but isn't sufficient without dataset curation.

User: Do biases affect different languages equally?
AI: Not necessarily; LLMs often exhibit more bias in low-resource languages.

User: Are certain model architectures more robust to bias?
AI: Some transformer variants have better fairness performance, but results are mixed.
